assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and either local Docker tooling or access to Teleport Enterprise Cloud signup.
No Teleport cluster or Teleport Cloud tenant exists yet.

developer_goal: Launch a Teleport evaluation environment and reach the earliest official checkpoint that proves Teleport is running and accessible.

first_success.outcome: Either a local Community Edition deployment serves the Teleport Web UI welcome screen, or a Teleport Enterprise Cloud trial tenant reaches its documented first evaluation checkpoint.
first_success.observable_signal: For Community local Docker: opening https://localhost:3080 shows the Teleport welcome screen after Community Edition terms. For Cloud: unresolved until the selected Cloud first-success checkpoint is fixed.

route_selection.rule: Enterprise Cloud, Enterprise Self-Hosted, and Community Edition are consequential peers on the official Get Started page; select one only after lexicographic ranking of payment, actions, and vendor-recommended evaluation guidance.

candidates.name: Enterprise Cloud quick evaluation
candidates.reason: Get Started recommends Cloud when evaluating quickly without provisioning infrastructure, and signup offers a free trial, but it is a different surface from local Community Edition and the complete Cloud first-success path after signup is not reconstructed here.

candidates.name: Community Edition local Docker welcome screen
candidates.reason: Documents a free local path to a welcome-screen checkpoint without Cloud signup, while Get Started also points evaluators to Cloud and the Community guide itself suggests Cloud when local prerequisites are unmet.

candidates.name: Community Edition remote Linux VM
candidates.reason: Peer Community path requiring a Linux host, DNS, and TLS prerequisites that change action count versus local Docker.

candidates.name: Enterprise Self-Hosted
candidates.reason: Requires a valid license and contacting Teleport; adds payment or sales entitlement before first success.

required_path.action: Create the Teleport control plane required by the selected edition: Cloud signup or local Community bootstrap.

required_fields.label: Edition-specific signup or bootstrap inputs
required_fields.notes: Cloud signup fields are not fully enumerated from the public marketing signup page; Community local Docker uses mkcert and container bootstrap instead of SaaS signup.

required_path.observable_result: A Teleport Auth/Proxy control plane exists for the selected edition.

required_path.action: Open the selected edition's first Web UI checkpoint and confirm Teleport is running.

required_fields.label: Community Edition terms acceptance when prompted
required_fields.notes: Applies to the Community Web UI path; Cloud terms/fields remain unresolved.

required_path.observable_result: The selected official checkpoint confirms Teleport is accessible.

prerequisites.description: Community local Docker requires mkcert, Docker, and ability to trust a local CA.
Enterprise Cloud requires completing Teleport trial signup.

external_gates.description: Enterprise Self-Hosted requires a valid license and contact with Teleport.

unavoidable_waits.description: Container image pulls and Teleport process start precede the local welcome-screen checkpoint.

platform_outcomes.description: A healthy Community Edition deployment serves the Teleport Web UI over HTTPS.
Enterprise Cloud provides a managed .teleport.sh tenant after successful trial activation.

excluded.item: Reading Get Started documentation as a measured action
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is evidence, not a product action.

excluded.item: Connecting infrastructure, RBAC, and auditing after the first running checkpoint
excluded.reason: The Community guide places those after the welcome-screen checkpoint.

sources.title: Get Started with Teleport
evidence_supported: Enterprise Cloud, Enterprise Self-Hosted, and Community Edition choice framing
Cloud recommended for quick evaluation without infrastructure

sources.title: Step 1 - Sign up for Teleport Enterprise Cloud
evidence_supported: Cloud deploy path entry after signup

sources.title: Step 1 - Deploy Teleport Community Edition
evidence_supported: Local Docker mkcert and container steps
Suggestion to use Enterprise Cloud when prerequisites are unmet

uncertainties.question: Which Get Started edition is the selected shortest path: Enterprise Cloud trial or Community Edition local Docker?
uncertainties.impact: Cloud matches quick-evaluation guidance and account creation; Community is free/local with a documented welcome-screen checkpoint. Counts and gates are not comparable until one route is chosen.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Lexicographic ranking that resolves vendor quick-evaluation guidance against the no-payment and minimize-actions rules, plus a complete Cloud post-signup first-success walkthrough if Cloud wins.

uncertainties.question: What exact fields and post-submit steps does the current Teleport Enterprise trial signup require?
uncertainties.impact: Cloud account-creation field counts and any email or approval waits remain unverified.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated observation of goteleport.com/signup through the first authenticated Cloud Web UI checkpoint.
